reviews.comment:
Como toda instalación del ACA baños impecables. Amable atención tanto en el expendio de combustibles como en el Full (café, comidas y bebidas).
Amplio lugar arbolado para tomar un descanso.

(Translated by Google)
Like all ACA facilities, the restrooms are spotless. Friendly service at both the gas station and the convenience store (coffee, food, and drinks). A large, shady area perfect for relaxing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURadHF6akdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Maravillosa estación con todo lo necesario para una parada en el camino. Gran arboleda con bancos y mesas y juegos para niños

(Translated by Google)
A wonderful station with everything you need for a stop along the way. A large grove with benches, tables, and a children's playground.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURac3RHdGZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Todo muy lindo .Faltan empleados para atender

(Translated by Google)
Everything is very nice. There are not enough employees to serve.
